# Development Phases Tracker

## Phase Definitions

### Phase 1: Core Foundation ✅ COMPLETE
- [x] Project structure setup
- [x] Database schema implementation
- [x] Basic LLM manager
- [x] Configuration system
- [x] Error handling framework
- [x] Logging system
- [x] Memory module implementation
- [x] API routes (chat, memory, extensions, debug, telemetry, processing, logs)
- [x] Extension Manager + core extensions (file_search, web_search)
- [x] Behind The Sena UI (React + Tailwind)
- [x] Boot detection system
- [x] Node.js launcher + distribution infrastructure

### Phase 2: Advanced Features - IN PROGRESS
- [ ] AI extension generation (AI-powered extension creation)
- [ ] Bootstrapper & benchmarking (performance metrics)
- [ ] Auto-optimization (system tuning)
- [ ] Telemetry dashboard (metrics visualization)
- [ ] Performance monitoring (real-time stats)
- [ ] Voice input/output support
- [ ] Plugin marketplace architecture

### Phase 3: Main Sena App UI - NOT STARTED
- [ ] Separate UI from debug dashboard
- [ ] Production-ready interface
- [ ] User-facing features
- [ ] Settings panel
- [ ] Profile management

### Phase 4: Testing & Polish - NOT STARTED
- [ ] Comprehensive test suite
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Bug fixes & stability
- [ ] Final documentation

### Phase 5: Distribution & Launch - NOT STARTED
- [ ] Create website (sena-ai.dev)
- [ ] Setup v1.0.0 release
- [ ] Marketing & announcements
- [ ] Community launch

## Current Status

**Version:** 1.0.0
**Phase:** Post Phase-1, ready for Phase 2
**Release:** Infrastructure ready, waiting for first release

## Phase 2 Starting Checklist

- [ ] Review completed Phase 1 work
- [ ] Plan Phase 2 priorities
- [ ] Create feature branches for Phase 2 items
- [ ] Update this tracker as work progresses

## How to Use This

Each developer should:
1. Check current phase here
2. Pick a task from current phase
3. Create branch: `feature/phase2-taskname`
4. Update checkbox when merging PR
5. Keep this file up-to-date
